title: World of Alice   Dino Fossil
description: World of Alice - Dino Fossil World of Alice - Dino Fossil is an educational game aimed at children. With Alices help, you will find different dinosaurs through their fossils in a fun way from your cell phone, tablet or computer. In World of Alice learning is fun. Game developed by: Nau.kids
instructions: Click on the dinosaur that matches your fossil
